hooks.statusMessage: Running tests, typecheck, and lint before commit...
hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then REPO_ROOT=$(dirname "$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir)") && cd "$REPO_ROOT" && bun test && bun typecheck && bun lint || (echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CI checks failed — fix errors before committing"}}' && exit 2); fi
